import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exactly_fills_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 10

    actual_value = knapsack(capacity, items)

    assert actual_value == expected_value, f"Expected knapsack to return {expected_value} but got {actual_value}"
